requirements.summary: Investigate and resolve the error preventing the application from functioning properly in Version 2
acceptanceCriteria: Application loads without errors in the browser console
Users can successfully register with a display name and receive a unique auth code
Users can log in using their unique auth code
No runtime errors appear when navigating between pages
All existing features (registration, login, connect, chat navigation) function as expected

file_operations.description: Review and fix any type mismatches or incorrect API calls related to the new backend interface (User type with authCode field). Ensure authenticateWithCode, registerUser, getAllUsers, connectUsers, and isConnected queries correctly handle the updated User structure with principal, authCode, and displayName fields.

Verify the authentication context correctly stores and retrieves the auth code from localStorage. Ensure login function properly calls authenticateWithCode backend method and handles the returned user ID. Fix any issues with session persistence or state management that could cause runtime errors.

Check that registration flow correctly calls registerUser backend method and handles the returned auth code. Ensure the auth code is properly displayed and the automatic login after registration works without errors. Fix any UI state issues or error handling gaps.

Verify the login form correctly submits the auth code to the useCodeAuth login function. Ensure error messages display properly and navigation to the connect page works after successful authentication. Fix any form validation or error handling issues.

Review the connect flow to ensure it correctly fetches all users, filters by auth code, and calls connectUsers with proper user IDs. Fix any issues with the user lookup logic or connection establishment that could cause runtime errors.

Verify the auth code badge displays correctly when a user is authenticated. Ensure logout functionality properly clears the authentication state and redirects appropriately. Fix any rendering issues or navigation logic errors.

Review route protection logic to ensure protected routes (connect, chat) are only accessible when authenticated. Verify all route definitions are correct and navigation between pages works without errors. Fix any routing configuration issues or beforeLoad guards that could cause navigation failures.

requirements.summary: Ensure the code-based authentication flow works correctly with session persistence across page refreshes
acceptanceCriteria: Users remain logged in after refreshing the page
Auth code badge displays correctly in the header when authenticated
Logout functionality clears session and redirects appropriately
Protected routes (connect, chat) are accessible only when authenticated

file_operations.description: Ensure the authentication context initializes from localStorage on mount to restore sessions across page refreshes. Verify the logout function properly clears localStorage and resets authentication state. Implement proper error boundaries if session restoration fails.

Verify the auth code badge correctly reads from the authentication context and displays the user's auth code when logged in. Ensure logout button triggers the context's logout function and navigates to the landing page. Fix any conditional rendering issues.

Implement or verify route guards that check authentication state before allowing access to protected routes (connect, chat). Ensure unauthenticated users are redirected to the login page. Verify the authentication context is properly consumed in route beforeLoad hooks.
